model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"    criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()","new":"    criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=0.1)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Add mild label smoothing to improve validation calibration and robustness in the short 256-step regime without changing model or optimizer complexity.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"    criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=0.1)","new":"    criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase hidden width to raise MLP capacity for the fixed 256-step budget while removing label smoothing that regressed validation loss in this run.","secondary_modes":["caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 20","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Scale MLP width one notch higher to improve representation quality within the same fixed-step budget, keeping the training recipe unchanged for a clean capacity test.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 2","new":"DEPTH = 3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Add one hidden block to increase nonlinear capacity after width scaling, testing whether extra depth improves loss under the same optimizer and schedule.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.2e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Slightly raise the peak learning rate to accelerate optimization for the larger 3-layer MLP within the fixed 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":["layout","summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 64","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Increase batch size to expose the model to more unique examples across the fixed 256 updates, aiming for lower validation loss in the step-limited regime.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.2e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"With the larger batch size now helping strongly, slightly reducing learning rate should improve late-step fit and validation loss by trading a bit of speed for stability.","secondary_modes":["micro","summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 3e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Slightly reduce AdamW weight decay to preserve more capacity in the larger MLP while keeping regularization, which can improve validation loss in this short-budget setting.","secondary_modes":["indexing","topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"    warmup_steps = min(max(total_steps // 10, 1), 20)","new":"    warmup_steps = min(max(total_steps // 20, 1), 10)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"Shorten warmup so the model reaches full learning rate earlier within 256 steps, which can improve final validation loss in this constrained-budget regime.","secondary_modes":["topk","micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"    warmup_steps = min(max(total_steps // 20, 1), 10)","new":"    warmup_steps = min(max(total_steps // 10, 1), 20)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"Restore the previous warmup length since shortening warmup degraded validation loss; this reverts to the better-performing schedule shape.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Lower the second Adam beta to make moment estimates more responsive during the short 256-step run, which can improve convergence speed and final validation loss.","secondary_modes":["topk","micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.97)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Further increase optimizer responsiveness by slightly lowering Adam beta2, targeting faster adaptation over the limited 256-step horizon.","secondary_modes":["topk","micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.97)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.95)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Test a more aggressive beta2 reduction to speed second-moment adaptation further, which may yield better optimization in the short fixed-step budget.","secondary_modes":["topk","micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.95)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.94)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Continue the successful beta2 trend with a smaller additional decrease to test whether slightly faster variance adaptation can further reduce validation loss.","secondary_modes":["topk","micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 9e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"After repeatedly increasing optimizer responsiveness, slightly lowering base learning rate may improve late-stage fit and reduce validation loss at the same step budget.","secondary_modes":["indexing","summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 9e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Revert the learning-rate reduction since it worsened validation loss; return to the better-performing 1e-3 setting.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.05","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Add very light dropout to reduce overfitting in the widened/deepened MLP while preserving most optimization speed under the fixed-step budget.","secondary_modes":["layout","micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.05","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Revert dropout because it clearly hurt validation loss in this short training budget; restore the best-performing no-dropout configuration.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.94)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.93)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Use the final step to continue the consistently positive beta2-lowering trend and test a slightly more responsive AdamW second-moment setting.","secondary_modes":["topk","micro"]}
